title: Cost-by-label drilldown (namespace)
description: User asks 'which namespace is the most expensive?' — canonical entry to log10x_list_by_label. Test enforces (1) list_by_label runs against the k8s_namespace label and produces ranked rows, (2) the chain emits a NEXT_ACTIONS hint into top_patterns or cost_drivers (the natural follow-up — drill into WHICH patterns drive the namespace's cost).
prompt: Which Kubernetes namespace is costing us the most? Break down the top 5.

initial_tool.reason: list_by_label ranks any label dimension by cost; k8s_namespace is the canonical operational dimension.

ground_truth.description: list_by_label result lists at least one namespace row with a dollar amount
